message:
fix(wa-core): add TTL-based expiry to deduplication cache

The DetectionContext dedup cache previously suppressed patterns forever
(until 1000 keys pushed them out via FIFO eviction). This caused issues
when legitimate repeated events should be re-detected after a cooldown.

Changes to DetectionContext:
- Replace HashSet<String> with HashMap<String, Instant> to track timestamps
- Add configurable ttl field (default: 5 minutes)
- Add set_ttl() method for custom TTL configuration
- Update mark_seen() to check if existing entry has expired
- Expired entries are treated as "new" and get fresh timestamp

This ensures patterns are re-emitted after the TTL expires while still
deduplicating rapid-fire duplicates within the window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
